Good morning, David ✿
How is Margaret today?
Welcome to your Care Partner Portal. This space is here to help you tend to Margaret — and to tend to yourself. Maya and the ASSP team share gentle updates here, but it's your space too.
◐
A garden tended by two hands
Maya tends Margaret's garden from her side. You tend it from yours. Solace helps both hands work in rhythm — so Margaret doesn't have to ask the same question twice, and you never feel alone in the work.
👩‍⚕️ Maya's notes ↔ ◐ Margaret ↔ ♡ Your care
🌿
Need a moment?
A quiet corner is always here · 90 seconds, no setup, no judgment. Take one whenever you need it.

A garden of care
Margaret remembered her wedding for the first time in months. The afternoon light slipped through the curtains, and her daughter held her hand. Some moments cannot be measured — only tended.
~ the garden whispers gently ~

~ would you like to capture a moment? ~
A "moment" can be: family thanks · a breakthrough · peer recognition. Takes 30 seconds. Margaret Chen's family will be asked for consent before anything is shared. You can also skip.
